category_sources: Official Open Liberty GitHub describes Open Liberty as an application server runtime environment.
source_facts.description says this is a lightweight open framework for Java Jakarta EE Web Profile 9.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openliberty-webprofile9 and source_facts.description identifies the Jakarta EE Web Profile 9 distribution.
docs_sources: Official Open Liberty website exposes project documentation at openliberty.io/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Open Liberty GitHub organization pins OpenLiberty/open-liberty as the runtime repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Java and Jakarta EE Web Profile 9; official Open Liberty repository describes the application server runtime.
